FROM (
    SELECT [g].[Id], [g].[CreatedAt], [g].[DataFim], [g].[DataInicio], [g].[DeletedAt], [g].[DiasSemana], [g].[EmpresaId], [g].[FornecedorId], [g].[HoraFinal], [g].[HoraInicial], [g].[IntervaloMinutos], [g].[LocalDescargaId], [g].[ProdutoId], [g].[UnidadeEntregaId], [g].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Grade] AS [g]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [g].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0
    ORDER BY [g].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [g0]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CodigoEan], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[DeletedAt], [p].[EmpresaId], [p].[FornecedorId], [p].[LocalDescargaId], [p].[Nome], [p].[UpdatedAt]

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[Ativa], [u].[Bairro], [u].[Cep], [u].[Cidade], [u].[Complemento], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[DeletedAt], [u].[EmpresaId], [u].[Estado], [u].[Latitude], [u].[Localizacao], [u].[Logradouro], [u].[Longitude], [u].[Nome], [u].[Numero], [u].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [UnidadeEntrega] AS [u]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [u].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0
) AS [u0] ON [g0].[UnidadeEntregaId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [f].[Id], [f].[Cnpj], [f].[CreatedAt], [f].[DeletedAt], [f].[EmpresaId], [f].[Nome], [f].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Fornecedor] AS [f]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [f].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0
) AS [f0] ON [g0].[FornecedorId] = [f0].[Id]

    FROM [LocalDescarga] AS [l]

Properties.commandText:
SELECT [a].[Id], [f0].[Nome] AS [FornecedorNome], CASE
    WHEN [u].[Id] IS NOT NULL THEN [m].[NomeReal]
END AS [MotoristaNome], [a].[DataInicio], [a].[DataFim], CASE
    WHEN [g0].[Id] IS NOT NULL THEN [p0].[Nome]
    ELSE CASE [a].[TipoCarga]
        WHEN 0 THEN N'Indefinido'
        WHEN 1 THEN N'Milho'
        WHEN 2 THEN N'SojaCrua'
        WHEN 3 THEN N'FareloDeSoja'
        WHEN 4 THEN N'Trigo'
        WHEN 5 THEN N'Arroz'
        WHEN 6 THEN N'Sorgo'
        WHEN 10 THEN N'Fosfato'
        WHEN 11 THEN N'Calcário'
        WHEN 12 THEN N'Potássio'
        WHEN 13 THEN N'Ureia'
        WHEN 14 THEN N'NPK'
        WHEN 20 THEN N'Sal'
        WHEN 21 THEN N'SalMineral'
        WHEN 22 THEN N'RacaoBovina'
        WHEN 23 THEN N'RacaoSuina'
        WHEN 24 THEN N'RacaoAves'
        WHEN 30 THEN N'Açucar'
        WHEN 31 THEN N'Algodao'
        WHEN 32 THEN N'Café'
        WHEN 33 THEN N'CanaDeAcucar'
        WHEN 99 THEN N'Outro'
        ELSE CAST([a].[TipoCarga] AS nvarchar(max))
    END
END AS [Produto], COALESCE([n0].[PesoBruto], [a].[VolumeCarga], 0.0) AS [PesoCarga], COALESCE([a].[PlacaVeiculo], [n0].[PlacaVeiculo]) AS [PlacaVeiculo], [u1].[Localizacao] AS [UnidadeEntrega], CASE [a].[StatusAgendamento]
    WHEN 0 THEN N'Disponivel'
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Pendente'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Agendado'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'EmAndamento'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Finalizado'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Cancelado'
    ELSE CAST([a].[StatusAgendamento] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Status], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[UpdatedAt], [a].[DeletedAt]
FROM [Agendamento] AS [a]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [f].[Id], [f].[Nome]
    FROM [Fornecedor] AS [f]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [f].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0
) AS [f0] ON [a].[FornecedorId] = [f0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Usuario] AS [u] ON [a].[UsuarioId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Motorista] AS [m] ON [u].[Id] = [m].[UsuarioId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [g].[Id], [g].[ProdutoId]
    FROM [Grade] AS [g]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [g].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0
) AS [g0] ON [a].[GradeId] = [g0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Nome]
    FROM [Produto] AS [p]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [p].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0
) AS [p0] ON [g0].[ProdutoId] = [p0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [n].[Id], [n].[PesoBruto], [n].[PlacaVeiculo]
    FROM [NotaFiscal] AS [n]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [n].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0
) AS [n0] ON [a].[NotaFiscalId] = [n0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[Id], [u0].[Localizacao]
    FROM [UnidadeEntrega] AS [u0]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [u0].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0
) AS [u1] ON [a].[UnidadeEntregaId] = [u1].[Id]
WHERE (@__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [a].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0) AND [a].[DataInicio] >= @__dataInicio_0 AND [a].[DataInicio] <= @__dataFim_1
ORDER BY [a].[DataInicio]

    WHEN [g0].[Id] IS NOT NULL THEN [p0].[Nome]
    ELSE CASE [a].[TipoCarga]
        WHEN 0 THEN N'Indefinido'
        WHEN 1 THEN N'Milho'
        WHEN 2 THEN N'SojaCrua'
        WHEN 3 THEN N'FareloDeSoja'
        WHEN 4 THEN N'Trigo'
        WHEN 5 THEN N'Arroz'
        WHEN 6 THEN N'Sorgo'
        WHEN 10 THEN N'Fosfato'
        WHEN 11 THEN N'Calcário'
        WHEN 12 THEN N'Potássio'
        WHEN 13 THEN N'Ureia'
        WHEN 14 THEN N'NPK'
        WHEN 20 THEN N'Sal'
        WHEN 21 THEN N'SalMineral'
        WHEN 22 THEN N'RacaoBovina'
        WHEN 23 THEN N'RacaoSuina'
        WHEN 24 THEN N'RacaoAves'
        WHEN 30 THEN N'Açucar'
        WHEN 31 THEN N'Algodao'
        WHEN 32 THEN N'Café'
        WHEN 33 THEN N'CanaDeAcucar'
        WHEN 99 THEN N'Outro'
        ELSE CAST([a].[TipoCarga] AS nvarchar(max))
    END
END AS [Produto], COALESCE([n0].[PesoBruto], [a].[VolumeCarga], 0.0) AS [PesoCarga], COALESCE([a].[PlacaVeiculo], [n0].[PlacaVeiculo]) AS [PlacaVeiculo], [u1].[Localizacao] AS [UnidadeEntrega], CASE [a].[StatusAgendamento]
    WHEN 0 THEN N'Disponivel'
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Pendente'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Agendado'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'EmAndamento'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Finalizado'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Cancelado'
    ELSE CAST([a].[StatusAgendamento] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Status], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[UpdatedAt], [a].[DeletedAt]
FROM [Agendamento] AS [a]
INNER JOIN (

) AS [p0] ON [g0].[ProdutoId] = [p0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [n].[Id], [n].[PesoBruto], [n].[PlacaVeiculo]

) AS [n0] ON [a].[NotaFiscalId] = [n0].[Id]

SELECT [a].[Id], [f0].[Nome] AS [FornecedorNome], CASE
    WHEN [u].[Id] IS NOT NULL THEN [m].[NomeReal]
END AS [MotoristaNome], [a].[DataInicio], [a].[DataFim], CASE
    WHEN [g0].[Id] IS NOT NULL THEN [p0].[Nome]
    ELSE CASE [a].[TipoCarga]
        WHEN 0 THEN N'Indefinido'
        WHEN 1 THEN N'Milho'
        WHEN 2 THEN N'SojaCrua'
        WHEN 3 THEN N'FareloDeSoja'
        WHEN 4 THEN N'Trigo'
        WHEN 5 THEN N'Arroz'
        WHEN 6 THEN N'Sorgo'
        WHEN 10 THEN N'Fosfato'
        WHEN 11 THEN N'Calcário'
        WHEN 12 THEN N'Potássio'
        WHEN 13 THEN N'Ureia'
        WHEN 14 THEN N'NPK'
        WHEN 20 THEN N'Sal'
        WHEN 21 THEN N'SalMineral'
        WHEN 22 THEN N'RacaoBovina'
        WHEN 23 THEN N'RacaoSuina'
        WHEN 24 THEN N'RacaoAves'
        WHEN 30 THEN N'Açucar'
        WHEN 31 THEN N'Algodao'
        WHEN 32 THEN N'Café'
        WHEN 33 THEN N'CanaDeAcucar'
        WHEN 99 THEN N'Outro'
        ELSE CAST([a].[TipoCarga] AS nvarchar(max))
    END
END AS [Produto], COALESCE([n0].[PesoBruto], [a].[VolumeCarga], 0.0) AS [PesoCarga], COALESCE([a].[PlacaVeiculo], [n0].[PlacaVeiculo]) AS [PlacaVeiculo], [u1].[Localizacao] AS [UnidadeEntrega], CASE [a].[StatusAgendamento]
    WHEN 0 THEN N'Disponivel'
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Pendente'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Agendado'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'EmAndamento'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Finalizado'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Cancelado'
    ELSE CAST([a].[StatusAgendamento] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Status], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[UpdatedAt], [a].[DeletedAt]
FROM [Agendamento] AS [a]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [f].[Id], [f].[Nome]
    FROM [Fornecedor] AS [f]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [f].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0
) AS [f0] ON [a].[FornecedorId] = [f0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Usuario] AS [u] ON [a].[UsuarioId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Motorista] AS [m] ON [u].[Id] = [m].[UsuarioId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [g].[Id], [g].[ProdutoId]
    FROM [Grade] AS [g]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [g].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0
) AS [g0] ON [a].[GradeId] = [g0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Nome]
    FROM [Produto] AS [p]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [p].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0
) AS [p0] ON [g0].[ProdutoId] = [p0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [n].[Id], [n].[PesoBruto], [n].[PlacaVeiculo]
    FROM [NotaFiscal] AS [n]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [n].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0
) AS [n0] ON [a].[NotaFiscalId] = [n0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[Id], [u0].[Localizacao]
    FROM [UnidadeEntrega] AS [u0]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [u0].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0
) AS [u1] ON [a].[UnidadeEntregaId] = [u1].[Id]
WHERE (@__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [a].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0) AND [a].[DataInicio] >= @__dataInicio_0 AND [a].[DataInicio] <= @__dataFim_1
ORDER BY [a].[DataInicio]

SELECT [a].[Id], [f0].[Nome] AS [FornecedorNome], CASE
    WHEN [u].[Id] IS NOT NULL THEN [m].[NomeReal]
END AS [MotoristaNome], [a].[DataInicio], [a].[DataFim], CASE
    WHEN [g0].[Id] IS NOT NULL THEN [p0].[Nome]
    ELSE CASE [a].[TipoCarga]
        WHEN 0 THEN N'Indefinido'
        WHEN 1 THEN N'Milho'
        WHEN 2 THEN N'SojaCrua'
        WHEN 3 THEN N'FareloDeSoja'
        WHEN 4 THEN N'Trigo'
        WHEN 5 THEN N'Arroz'
        WHEN 6 THEN N'Sorgo'
        WHEN 10 THEN N'Fosfato'
        WHEN 11 THEN N'Calcário'
        WHEN 12 THEN N'Potássio'
        WHEN 13 THEN N'Ureia'
        WHEN 14 THEN N'NPK'
        WHEN 20 THEN N'Sal'
        WHEN 21 THEN N'SalMineral'
        WHEN 22 THEN N'RacaoBovina'
        WHEN 23 THEN N'RacaoSuina'
        WHEN 24 THEN N'RacaoAves'
        WHEN 30 THEN N'Açucar'
        WHEN 31 THEN N'Algodao'
        WHEN 32 THEN N'Café'
        WHEN 33 THEN N'CanaDeAcucar'
        WHEN 99 THEN N'Outro'
        ELSE CAST([a].[TipoCarga] AS nvarchar(max))
    END
END AS [Produto], COALESCE([n0].[PesoBruto], [a].[VolumeCarga], 0.0) AS [PesoCarga], COALESCE([a].[PlacaVeiculo], [n0].[PlacaVeiculo]) AS [PlacaVeiculo], [u1].[Localizacao] AS [UnidadeEntrega], CASE [a].[StatusAgendamento]
    WHEN 0 THEN N'Disponivel'
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Pendente'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Agendado'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'EmAndamento'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Finalizado'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Cancelado'
    ELSE CAST([a].[StatusAgendamento] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Status], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[UpdatedAt], [a].[DeletedAt]
FROM [Agendamento] AS [a]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [f].[Id], [f].[Nome]
    FROM [Fornecedor] AS [f]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [f].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0
) AS [f0] ON [a].[FornecedorId] = [f0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Usuario] AS [u] ON [a].[UsuarioId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Motorista] AS [m] ON [u].[Id] = [m].[UsuarioId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [g].[Id], [g].[ProdutoId]
    FROM [Grade] AS [g]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [g].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0
) AS [g0] ON [a].[GradeId] = [g0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Nome]
    FROM [Produto] AS [p]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [p].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0
) AS [p0] ON [g0].[ProdutoId] = [p0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [n].[Id], [n].[PesoBruto], [n].[PlacaVeiculo]
    FROM [NotaFiscal] AS [n]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [n].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0
) AS [n0] ON [a].[NotaFiscalId] = [n0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[Id], [u0].[Localizacao]
    FROM [UnidadeEntrega] AS [u0]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [u0].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0
) AS [u1] ON [a].[UnidadeEntregaId] = [u1].[Id]
WHERE (@__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [a].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0) AND [a].[DataInicio] >= @__dataInicio_0 AND [a].[DataInicio] <= @__dataFim_1
ORDER BY [a].[DataInicio]
